title: Ubiquiti UACC-Intercom-FM, flush mount for UA-Intercom
category: Ubiquiti UACC-Intercom-FM, flush mount for UA-Intercom
description: UACC-Intercom-FM is a mounting accessory for flush mounting of the UA-Intercom . The holder itself is made of powder-coated steel, the front side is covered with a UV-stable polycarbonate frame
